name: Pot Roast of Beef
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper the roast.
Put the vegetables at the bottom of the Crock-POT.
Add the salted and peppered roast on top of the vegetables.
Pour in the water or beef broth.
Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours (or High for 4 to 5 hours).
Using a spatula, carefully remove the meat and vegetables from the pot.
Serve with desired side dishes.
ROAST BEEF VARIATIONS
German Style: Add 3 to 4 medium dill pickles and 1 teaspoon of dill weed to the recipe.
Italian: Add 1 8-ounce can of tomato sauce, 1 teaspoon of oregano, and 1 teaspoon of basil. Do not add water. Season the roast with salt, pepper, and other favorite seasonings.
To keep the tops of meat and vegetables moist when cooking smaller amounts, rub 1 tablespoon of butter or oil directly on top of the meat before serving.
